allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const c=fs.readFileSync\('c:/Users/elveg/Downloads/Mesa/src/app/waiter/control/page.tsx','utf8'\);const nonAscii=c.match\(/[^\\x00-\\x7F]/g\);const unique=[...new Set\(nonAscii\)];console.log\('Total no-ASCII chars:',nonAscii?.length||0\);console.log\('Unique no-ASCII chars:',unique.join\(' '\)\);console.log\('First codepoints:',unique.slice\(0,30\).map\(c=>c.charCodeAt\(0\).toString\(16\)\).join\(' '\)\);")
